info.name: AI Mock Generation
info.description: Collection for testing MockNest Serverless AI-powered mock generation features

body.raw:
{
  "namespace": {
    "apiName": "petstore",
    "client": "demo"
  },
  "specification": "openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Pet Store API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /pets:
    get:
      operationId: getPets
      summary: Get all pets
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Success
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    id:
                      type: integer
                    name:
                      type: string
                    status:
                      type: string
                      enum: [available, pending, sold]
    post:
      operationId: createPet
      summary: Create a new pet
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
                status:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: integer
                  name:
                    type: string
                  status:
                    type: string",
  "format": "OPENAPI_3",
  "options": {
    "includeExamples": true,
    "generateErrorCases": true,
    "realisticData": true,
    "storeSpecification": true
  }
}
